english: Salutations to you, O primal god — be gracious to me, O sun
Salutations to the day-maker, salutations to the light-maker
Mounted on a chariot of seven horses, blazing, son of Kashyapa
roman: Sapta ashva ratha marudam prachandam Kashyapatmajam

english: The god who holds a white lotus — I bow to that Sun
roman: Shweta padma dharam devam tam Suryam pranamamyaham

english: Red-hued, mounted on a chariot, the grandfather of all worlds
roman: Lohitam ratha marudham sarva loka pitamaham

english: The divine remover of great sins — I bow to that Sun
roman: Maha papa haram devam tam Suryam pranamamyaham

hindi: सूर्याष्टकं यः पठेत् नित्यं गृहे तिष्ठन् सुखान्वितः।
english: Whoever reads this Suryashtakam daily, dwelling happily at home
roman: Surya ashtakam yah pathet nityam grihe tishthan sukhanvitah

english: Is freed from all sins and diseases and becomes happy
roman: Sarva papa vinirmukto roga mukta sukhi bhavet
